descriptionShort: Moncton Hawks coach Rick Bowness discusses rookie defenceman Matt Hervey's play, noting Orland Kurtenbach's recommendation from Richmond Sockeyes.
descriptionLong: Moncton Hawks coach Rick Bowness highlights rookie defenceman Matt Hervey as a standout performer despite the team's last-place AHL record. Hervey, who played for the Richmond Sockeyes under coach Orland Kurtenbach the previous season, came to the Winnipeg Jets training camp as a walk-on before joining Moncton. Bowness credits Kurtenbach's recommendation for the signing.

attribution.headline: Moncton Hawks' Rick Bowness praises rookie defenceman Matt Hervey
